observed: Navigated to the document edit page. Clicked 'Document Settings' button which opened a dialog with heading 'Document Settings'. The dialog contained a 'Time Zone' combobox showing 'Europe/London'. Clicked the combobox to open the dropdown, which displayed a scrollable list of timezone options (Etc/UTC, Africa/Abidjan, Africa/Accra, ... America/New_York, ... Pacific/Wallis). Clicked on 'America/New_York' option. After selection, the dropdown closed and the Time Zone combobox now shows 'America/New_York' as the selected value.
